description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a tan gable roof and a compact rectangular footprint, set within a small landscaped lot. The front features a paved driveway leading to the entrance, flanked by a row of evenly spaced trees and a small lawn area. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored materials, with visible windows and a modest porch at the front. The rear and sides of the bungalow are bordered by a tall, solid privacy wall, providing seclusion from the surrounding environment. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with the main entrance and porch facing the street. The overall design is practical and suburban, suitable for a quiet residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story tan-roofed bungalow with a front porch, driveway, and a row of trees, enclosed by a tall privacy wall. The house features a simple, functional window arrangement and a landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance, porch, driveway, and a row of trees along the street-facing side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lot, the side of the bungalow, and the tall privacy wall.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the tall privacy wall, with the bungalow mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the bungalow, the porch, and the continuation of the privacy wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
